tools.name: get_gas_price
tools.description: Get current gas prices for an EVM chain. Returns gas price in Gwei with USD estimate.

tools.name: get_token_price
tools.description: Get real-time token price from DEX. Returns USD price and 24h change.

tools.name: search_tokens
tools.description: Search for tokens by name or symbol. Returns matching tokens with market data.

tools.name: get_polymarket_odds
tools.description: Get real-time prediction market odds from Polymarket. Returns event data with probabilities.

tools.name: web_retrieve
tools.description: Fetch and extract text content from a URL. Returns clean text suitable for AI processing.

tools.name: captcha_solve
tools.description: Solve CAPTCHA challenges (reCAPTCHA v2/v3, hCaptcha, Cloudflare Turnstile). Returns solution token.

tools.name: url_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of a web page. Returns base64-encoded PNG image.

tools.name: web_extract
tools.description: Extract structured data from a web page using CSS selectors. Returns text content keyed by your labels. Uses a headless browser.

tools.name: web_fill
tools.description: Fill web form fields and optionally submit. Handles text inputs, selects, radio buttons, and checkboxes. Uses a headless browser.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: web_retrieve · Private data: get_token_price, search_tokens, captcha_solve · Public sink: web_fill.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: web_retrieve · Private data: get_token_price, search_tokens, captcha_solve · Public sink: web_fill

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
